## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Architecture boundary respected (`core`/`ui` are leaves)
- [ ] No new secrets committed / no `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` for secret keys
- [ ] No new `mock_*` without a tracking issue
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (ARCHITECTURE / SETUP / ROADMAP)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (required Phase 3+)

## Security note
- [ ] No auth guard bypassed
- [ ] No new server-exposed secret
